title: Render RST Page Image
cap_description: Render a page-like PNG image preview of the RST document
documentation:
## Purpose

Renders a reStructuredText (RST) file as a page-like PNG image. The RST markup is formatted and laid out, then captured as a PNG. Useful for generating document previews of RST documentation files.

## Inputs

- An RST file (path or stdin, media type `media:rst;textable`).
- Page width in pixels (default 800).
- Page height in pixels (default 1200).

## Outputs

A PNG image representing the rendered RST page.

## Notes

- RST is commonly used in Python project documentation (Sphinx). Use this cap when you need a visual preview of `.rst` files.
- For plain text or Markdown, use [Render Text Page Image](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:txt;textable";op=render_page_image;out="media:image;png") or [Render Markdown Page Image](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:md;textable";op=render_page_image;out="media:image;png").

args.arg_description: Path to the RST file to process
Width of the page image in pixels
Height of the page image in pixels

output.output_description: PNG image data representing the rendered RST page
